rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Nils Hult
rule_metadata.title: Member Added to Privileged Domain Group

rules.rule_text:
title: Member Added to Privileged Domain Group
id: 6e350350-f040-4f3f-bbe5-35a3a8c00f6b
description: Could indicate privilege escalation or persistence. Look for suspicious
  surrounding activity or odd account name.
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Nils Hult
date: '2024-02-14'
modified: '2024-02-14'
logsource:
  category: windows
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4728
    GroupName:
    - Account Operators
    - Administrator
    - Administrators
    - Backup Operators
    - Domain Admins
    - Domain Controllers
    - Enterprise Admins
    - Krbtgt
    - Print Operators
    - Read-only Domain Controllers
    - Replicator
    - Schema Admins
    - Server Operators
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate administrative activity
level: medium
fields:
- AccountName
- GroupName
- TargetDomainName
- SubjectUserName
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
